theme.en: Capacity Expands as Supply Controls Tighten
theme.zh: 产能扩张与供应管控同步收紧

dek.en: TSMC is widening its N2 and advanced-packaging footprint while China, Europe, and the UK pursue more sovereign compute capacity. The expansion is colliding with tighter export scrutiny and persistent constraints in memory and substrates.
dek.zh: 台积电正扩大N2与先进封装布局，中国、欧洲和英国也在推进更自主的算力产能。与此同时，出口审查趋严，存储与封装基板的供应约束仍未消退。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Disaggregated AI Compute Targets the Token-Throughput Barrier
title.zh: 解耦式AI计算瞄准Token吞吐瓶颈

summary.en: SemiWiki examines disaggregating AI compute as a way to raise token throughput without simply building ever-larger monolithic data centers. The approach matters because power, water, land, and interconnect limits are becoming first-order constraints on scaling inference infrastructure.
summary.zh: SemiWiki探讨通过解耦AI计算来提升Token吞吐，而不是一味建设更庞大的单体数据中心。其意义在于，电力、用水、土地和互连能力正成为推理基础设施扩张的一阶约束。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: TSMC Coordinates Multi-Fab N2 Ramp with CoWoS and SoIC Expansion
title.zh: 台积电协同推进多厂N2量产与CoWoS、SoIC扩产

summary.en: TSMC is pursuing simultaneous N2 ramps across multiple fabs while expanding CoWoS and SoIC capacity for AI accelerators. Coordinating leading-edge wafers with advanced packaging is critical because packaging, rather than transistor supply alone, has repeatedly limited accelerator shipments.
summary.zh: 台积电正同步推进多座晶圆厂的N2量产，并扩大面向AI加速器的CoWoS与SoIC产能。先进制程晶圆必须与先进封装协同扩张，因为限制加速器出货的往往不只是晶体管产能，还包括封装能力。

title.en: GlobalFoundries and Qualinx Demonstrate a European Secure-Chip Manufacturing Flow
title.zh: GlobalFoundries与Qualinx展示欧洲安全芯片制造流程

summary.en: GlobalFoundries and Qualinx announced a European manufacturing flow for security-critical semiconductors. The demonstration is a concrete step in Europe's effort to keep sensitive chip design and production within a regionally controlled supply chain.
summary.zh: GlobalFoundries与Qualinx宣布完成面向安全关键型半导体的欧洲制造流程展示。这一进展为欧洲将敏感芯片的设计与生产保留在区域可控供应链内提供了更具体的落点。

title.en: Intel Positions Xeon 6+ as Its First Efficient-Core Server Chip on 18A
title.zh: Intel将Xeon 6+定位为首款采用18A的能效核服务器芯片

summary.en: Intel's Xeon 6+ is presented as the first efficient-core Xeon processor manufactured on the company's 18A process. A successful server-product ramp would give Intel Foundry an important internal proof point for 18A yield, performance, and manufacturing readiness.
summary.zh: Intel的Xeon 6+被定位为首款采用公司18A工艺制造的能效核Xeon处理器。若服务器产品能够顺利放量，将为Intel Foundry验证18A的良率、性能和制造成熟度提供重要的内部样板。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: Substrate Supply Tightens Alongside HBM and Memory
title.zh: HBM与存储趋紧之际，封装基板也出现短缺

summary.en: A Maeil Business Newspaper report says substrate availability is tightening alongside HBM and other memory, with large technology buyers offering funding in exchange for volume. The pattern shows that AI supply constraints are spreading beyond chips into the packaging materials needed to assemble them.
summary.zh: 《每日经济新闻》报道称，在HBM及其他存储供应趋紧的同时，封装基板也开始短缺，大型科技买家甚至提出以资金换取产量。该趋势表明，AI供应瓶颈正从芯片本身扩散至组装芯片所需的封装材料。

title.en: AI-Driven Memory Shortage Forces IT Budget Revisions
title.zh: AI驱动的存储短缺迫使IT预算重新调整

summary.en: Surging memory prices and shortages are making servers and PCs harder for enterprise IT departments to procure. The impact is moving upstream demand from an infrastructure issue into corporate budgets, where higher component costs can delay refresh cycles and data-center deployments.
summary.zh: 存储价格上涨和供应短缺正使企业IT部门更难采购服务器与PC。影响已从基础设施供应问题传导至企业预算，更高的部件成本可能推迟设备更新周期和数据中心部署。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
title.zh: 设备与材料

title.en: Chinese Optical-Chip Process Claims to Avoid UV Lithography
title.zh: 中国光芯片工艺声称绕开紫外光刻

summary.en: A Chinese company reportedly manufactured optical chips without ultraviolet lithography equipment. If the process proves scalable, it could reduce dependence on restricted lithography tools for a specialized class of photonic devices, though it does not imply a substitute for leading-edge logic lithography.
summary.zh: 报道称，一家中国公司在不使用紫外光刻设备的情况下制造出光芯片。如果该工艺能够规模化，它可能降低特定光子器件对受限光刻工具的依赖，但这并不意味着其可替代先进逻辑芯片所需的光刻技术。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: UK Commits £1.1 Billion to AI and Semiconductors
title.zh: 英国向AI与半导体投入11亿英镑

summary.en: The UK is investing £1.1 billion in its AI and semiconductor sectors. The commitment adds public capital to the competition for domestic compute, chip expertise, and research capacity, although execution will determine how much manufacturing depth it creates.
summary.zh: 英国将向AI与半导体产业投入11亿英镑。这笔公共资金将用于争夺本土算力、芯片人才和研发能力，但最终能形成多深的制造基础，仍取决于具体执行。

title.en: US Lawmakers Target TSMC Supply Loopholes Using Chinese Shell Companies
title.zh: 美国议员瞄准中国空壳公司获取台积电供应的漏洞

summary.en: US lawmakers are scrutinizing whether Chinese shell companies can circumvent restrictions to obtain chips made by TSMC. Closing that route would increase customer-screening and traceability obligations across foundries, distributors, and design firms.
summary.zh: 美国议员正审查中国空壳公司是否能够绕过限制，获得台积电制造的芯片。若这一渠道被封堵，晶圆代工厂、分销商和芯片设计公司的客户审查与供应链追踪义务都将增加。

title.en: China Drafts $295 Billion AI Data-Center Grid Built Around Domestic Chips
title.zh: 中国拟建2950亿美元国产芯片AI数据中心网络

summary.en: China is drafting a roughly 2 trillion yuan, or $295 billion, five-year plan for a national AI data-center grid targeting 80% domestic silicon by 2028. The scale would create a major demand anchor for local accelerators, networking, memory, and power equipment, but domestic chip production may limit the timetable.
summary.zh: 中国正拟定一项约2万亿元人民币、折合2950亿美元的五年计划，建设全国AI数据中心网络，并争取到2028年实现80%的国产芯片占比。其规模将为本土加速器、网络、存储和电力设备创造巨大需求，但国内芯片产能可能制约进度。

title.en: Earnings & Markets
title.zh: 财报与市场

title.en: TSMC Posts Record May Revenue Above NT$416.9 Billion
title.zh: 台积电5月营收突破4169亿新台币创纪录

summary.en: TSMC reported record May sales exceeding NT$416.9 billion as AI-related chip demand remained strong. The result supports the case that leading-edge foundry and advanced-packaging demand is still expanding even as investors debate the durability of the AI capital-spending cycle.
summary.zh: 在AI相关芯片需求保持强劲之际，台积电公布5月营收超过4169亿新台币，创下纪录。该数据表明，先进制程代工与先进封装需求仍在扩张，尽管市场仍在讨论AI资本开支周期能持续多久。

title.en: Challengers
title.zh: 挑战者

title.en: SpacemiT Demonstrates a Practical RVA23 RISC-V Mini Desktop
title.zh: 进迭时空展示可实用的RVA23 RISC-V迷你桌面机

summary.en: SpacemiT demonstrated a mini desktop based on actual RVA23-class RISC-V hardware with performance described as usable. A credible desktop system broadens RISC-V's position beyond embedded devices, while price and software compatibility remain decisive for adoption.
summary.zh: 进迭时空展示了一款基于RVA23级RISC-V硬件的迷你桌面机，其性能已被描述为具备实用性。可信的桌面系统可推动RISC-V走出嵌入式设备，但价格和软件兼容性仍将决定其采用速度。

theme.en: Move Less Data, Use Hardware Better
theme.zh: 少搬数据，更高效地使用硬件

dek.en: This week's systems papers attack overhead at the boundaries: CPU-to-accelerator transfers, fixed-width FPGA datapaths, distributed-training communication, and long-context KV caches. Several results turn architectural constraints into scheduling, packing, or compiler problems rather than demanding new silicon.
dek.zh: 本周系统研究集中削减边界开销，包括CPU到加速器的数据传输、FPGA固定宽度数据通路、分布式训练通信以及长上下文KV cache。多项工作把硬件限制转化为调度、打包或编译问题，而不是直接要求新芯片。

title.en: Circuits, Architecture & Reliability
title.zh: 电路、架构与可靠性

title.en: ITD-Aware CPU Thermal Control Finds Cooling Can Go Too Far
title.zh: 考虑ITD的CPU温控表明降温也可能过度

papers.authors: J. Crop, H. Moore, S. Pasricha

summary.en: Measurements on production Intel Xeon CPUs show that inverse temperature dependence creates a part-specific efficiency optimum above typical operating temperatures. Roughly half of the high-power CPUs observed on Amazon and Equinix platforms ran about 10°C below that point, and an ITD-aware grouping and inlet-control case study reduced total data-center energy by 4-13%. The result challenges blanket low-temperature policies, though savings will depend on processor mix and facility conditions.
summary.zh: 对量产Intel Xeon CPU的测量显示，反温度效应会形成因芯片型号而异的能效最优温度，而且往往高于常见运行温度。在Amazon和Equinix平台观察到的高功耗CPU中，约一半运行温度比该最优点低约10°C；采用ITD感知的分组和进风温度控制后，案例研究将数据中心总能耗降低了4%至13%。这一结果挑战了统一追求低温的策略，但实际收益仍取决于处理器组合和机房条件。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: AXI4MLIR Eliminates a Redundant CPU-to-Accelerator Copy
title.zh: AXI4MLIR消除CPU到加速器的冗余拷贝

papers.authors: E. Cohavi, N. B. Agostini, J. Haris, et al.

summary.en: The authors extend AXI4MLIR so host buffers are allocated directly in DMA-mapped memory, removing the staging copy from heap memory before accelerator transfers. On a configurable matrix-multiplication accelerator, the change cuts main-memory data movement by as much as 2x and raises accelerator utilization. The work shows that compiler and runtime plumbing can recover performance otherwise lost outside the compute kernel.
summary.zh: 作者扩展AXI4MLIR，使主机缓冲区直接分配在DMA映射内存中，从而消除加速器传输前从堆内存进行的中转拷贝。在可配置矩阵乘加速器上，该改动最多将主存数据搬运量降低2倍，并提高了加速器利用率。研究说明，编译器和运行时的数据通路优化可以收回原本损失在计算内核之外的性能。

title.en: SECDA-DSE Uses LLMs to Explore FPGA Accelerator Designs
title.zh: SECDA-DSE利用LLM探索FPGA加速器设计

papers.authors: V. Sharma, X. Fu, J. Haris, J. Cano

summary.en: SECDA-DSE combines a structured design-space explorer with an LLM stack using retrieval and iterative feedback to generate FPGA accelerator configurations. The evaluation covers element-wise multiplication, 2D convolution, and matrix transpose through end-to-end SystemC and FPGA execution. The approach could reduce manual search effort, but its value depends on whether generated designs remain reproducible and competitive across larger workloads.
summary.zh: SECDA-DSE将结构化设计空间探索器与采用检索和迭代反馈的LLM模块结合，用于生成FPGA加速器配置。评估覆盖逐元素乘法、二维卷积和矩阵转置，并完成SystemC与FPGA端到端执行。该方法有望减少人工搜索成本，但其价值仍取决于生成设计在更大工作负载上的可复现性和竞争力。

title.en: Dynamic Arithmetic Packing Raises FPGA DSP Utilization
title.zh: 动态算术打包提升FPGA DSP利用率

papers.authors: T. Borntrager, S. Fleming, P. Holzinger, et al.

summary.en: This work packs arbitrary-width signed and unsigned low-precision operands into wide FPGA multiplier paths by using the DSP block's internal pre-adder. Integrated into AMD FINN, the method reduces LUT use by 21% and improves frames per second per DSP by 36% on UltraNet versus the reference implementation. It directly addresses the mismatch between quantized neural networks and fixed-width FPGA arithmetic resources.
summary.zh: 该工作利用DSP模块内部的预加器，将任意位宽的有符号和无符号低精度操作数动态打包到宽乘法数据通路中。该方法集成进AMD FINN后，在UltraNet上相较参考实现将LUT占用降低21%，并把每个DSP对应的FPS提高36%。它直接缓解了量化神经网络与FPGA固定宽度算术资源之间的不匹配。

title.en: Efficient AI Training & Inference
title.zh: 高效AI训练与推理

title.en: Piper Makes Distributed Training Strategies Programmable
title.zh: Piper让分布式训练策略可编程

papers.authors: M. Frisella, S. Tiwari, A. Ruan, et al.

summary.en: Piper separates high-level distributed-training strategy from runtime implementation through annotations, scheduling directives, and a global training-DAG intermediate representation. It compiles that representation into per-device execution plans, allowing combinations of data, pipeline, expert, and ZeRO-style parallelism without hard-coding each strategy. The abstraction could shorten experimentation cycles, although the supplied candidate abstract does not expose full comparative performance results.
summary.zh: Piper通过模型注解、调度指令和全局训练DAG中间表示，将高层分布式训练策略与运行时实现分离。系统把该表示编译为逐设备执行计划，从而组合数据并行、流水线并行、专家并行和ZeRO类优化，而无需为每种策略硬编码实现。这一抽象可能缩短实验周期，但候选摘要未给出完整的对比性能结果。

title.en: ReasonAlloc Assigns KV-Cache Budgets by Layer and Head
title.zh: ReasonAlloc按层和注意力头分配KV Cache预算

papers.authors: W. Liu, H. Shi, Y. Li, et al.

summary.en: ReasonAlloc is a training-free method that allocates decoding-time KV-cache capacity hierarchically instead of applying a uniform token-eviction budget. It combines offline layer allocation based on a reported reasoning-demand pattern with online reallocation toward information-rich attention heads. Tests on MATH-500 and AIME 2024 span three reasoning models, but the candidate abstract truncates before the full numerical gains.
summary.zh: ReasonAlloc是一种免训练方法，在解码阶段分层分配KV cache容量，而不是对所有位置采用统一的Token淘汰预算。它结合基于推理需求模式的离线逐层预分配，以及面向高信息量注意力头的在线重分配。测试覆盖MATH-500、AIME 2024和三种推理模型，但候选摘要未完整提供数值提升。

title.en: CoT Fine-Tuning Can Break Long-Range Recall in Hybrid LLMs
title.zh: CoT微调可能破坏混合LLM的长程召回

papers.authors: X. Zhou, B. Zhu, Y. Xu, et al.

summary.en: The paper finds that chain-of-thought supervised fine-tuning can sharply degrade long-context retrieval in hybrid linear-attention models; HypeNet-9B falls from 67.2% to 9.4% on NIAH-S2 at 256K. The authors trace the failure to short-range-biased updates in query and key projections, then propose QK-Restore, which restores those weights from the pre-fine-tuning checkpoint without retraining. The reported recovery preserves reasoning performance, suggesting post-training evaluations must test memory and reasoning together.
summary.zh: 论文发现，思维链监督微调会显著削弱混合线性注意力模型的长上下文检索能力；HypeNet-9B在256K长度的NIAH-S2上从67.2%降至9.4%。作者将问题归因于查询和键投影受到偏向短程模式的更新，并提出QK-Restore，从微调前检查点恢复这些权重而无需重新训练。结果显示该方法可在保留推理能力的同时恢复长程召回，说明后训练评估必须同时检查记忆与推理。

title.en: Express Converts Non-Causal Attention Approximations for Efficient Decoding
title.zh: Express将非因果注意力近似转换为高效解码方案

papers.authors: A. Gong, A. M. Carrell, R. Dwivedi, L. Mackey

summary.en: Express converts a non-causal attention approximation into a causal one while retaining matching approximation guarantees. Combined with Thinformer, it uses O(s) memory with O(s^2 log^2(n)) compression overhead and an I/O-aware Triton implementation that reportedly outperforms FlashAttention 2. The authors apply it to long-context prefill, KV-cache compression, and memory- or compute-constrained decoding.
summary.zh: Express把非因果注意力近似转换为因果形式，同时保持相匹配的近似保证。与Thinformer结合后，它只需O(s)内存和O(s^2 log^2(n))压缩开销，并通过I/O感知的Triton实现取得了相对FlashAttention 2的加速。作者将其用于长上下文Prefill、KV cache压缩以及内存或算力受限的解码。

title.en: Quantum Computing
title.zh: 量子计算

title.en: Coset Ensemble Decoder Co-Designs QEC Algorithms and Hardware
title.zh: 陪集集成解码器协同设计量子纠错算法与硬件

papers.authors: S. Liang, J. Xu, G. Bassanino, et al.

summary.en: The proposed quantum-error-correction decoder explores multiple coset-consistent Union-Find candidates and aggregates them toward coset-level maximum-likelihood decoding. Reverse-order elimination and lossless graph compression reduce compute and memory, while a domain-specific architecture reuses resources over time instead of scaling hardware spatially with code distance. The design targets the difficult combination of low logical error and real-time decoding latency required by fault-tolerant systems.
summary.zh: 该量子纠错解码器探索多个满足陪集一致性的Union-Find候选，并进行聚合以逼近陪集级最大似然解码。逆序消元和无损图压缩降低了计算与内存开销，专用硬件架构则通过时间复用资源，避免硬件规模随码距进行空间扩张。该设计瞄准容错量子系统同时要求低逻辑错误率和实时解码延迟的难题。
